posts.author: karlygallis (Karly Gallis)
posts.cookedHtml:
My team uses an automation that says:
“When column changes
and only if Person is [Name]…”

Right now, I can only put one person per automation. I’d really like an OR siginfier (“and only if Person is [Name] or [Name] or [Name]…”) or the option to say “when Person is anyone in this team.”
I currently have an individual automation for all thirty people on our team, in every board. If either solution above was possible, I’d need only three.

image1980×738 51.4 KB

posts.author: naqide (Naqi Abbas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Karly,

I can provide you the solution to this problem. Reach out to me at naqi@digitalesque.com

Thank you!

posts.author: gygagnon (Guy)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you post solution here for the group?

posts.author: gpstew (Paul)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed, I’d like to have the solution to this as well.
